nasb.text: For behold, you shall conceive and give birth to a son, and no razor shall come upon his head, for the boy shall be a Nazirite to God from the womb; and he shall begin to deliver Israel from the hands of the Philistines.”

esv.text: for behold, you shall conceive and bear a son. No razor shall come upon his head, for the child shall be a Nazirite to God from the womb, and he shall begin to save Israel from the hand of the Philistines.”

cnv.text: 看哪！你必懷孕，生一個兒子；不可用剃刀剃他的頭，這孩子從在母腹開始就歸　神作拿細耳人；他必拯救以色列人脫離非利士人的手。”

ccb.text: 你必怀孕生一个儿子，你不可为他剃头，因为他一出生就要归给上帝做拿细耳人。他要从非利士人手中拯救以色列人。”
